description: BOBJ to Datasphere and SAC Converter XSUAA Security Descriptor

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.read
scopes.description: Read conversion results, projects, and jobs

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.push
scopes.description: Push generated entities to Datasphere and SAC

role-templates.name: Viewer
role-templates.description: Can view conversion jobs and results

role-templates.name: Converter
role-templates.description: Can submit conversion jobs and view results

role-templates.name: Publisher
role-templates.description: Can convert and push outputs to Datasphere and SAC

role-templates.name: Admin
role-templates.description: Full access including all project management

role-collections.name: BOBJ Converter - Publisher
role-collections.description: Full conversion and publish to Datasphere and SAC
